sp_widget.name: MSP Premier Support Approval
sp_widget.template:
${Approve Estimate}
{{data.note}}
${Service Estimate}
{{data.estimateHourLabel}}
${Chargeable Hours}
{{data.chargeableHoursLabel}}
${Current Hours Balance}
{{data.balanceLabel}}
${Price per hour}
{{data.priceUnit}}{{data.pricePerHour}}
${Total Non Recurring Charges}
{{data.priceUnit}}{{data.totalNRC}}
${I agree to}
${Terms and Conditions}

${You do not have permission to approve this estimate}.
